steps.action: Launch Electron app with remote debugging
steps.expected: App starts and loads login page
Page shows summary cards and table
steps.observed: Summary cards (PA1, PA2, Overdue, Total) and table rendered correctly
PA1=5, PA2=2, Overdue=0, Total=7 - counts match combined module data

assertions.title: Unified Table Shows All Pending Transactions

steps.expected: All pending transactions visible including PA1 and PA2
steps.observed: Only PA1 transactions displayed (5 items). PA2 transactions are missing from 'All' status view
PA2 items DO appear when explicitly filtered

assertions.issues: Bug in DashboardApprovalPage.tsx loadPendingApprovals(): when statusFilter is 'all', it queries PA1 and PA2 separately but the PA2 fetch condition evaluates incorrectly, causing PA2 items to be excluded from the unified table.

steps.action: Apply search filter with nonexistent term
steps.observed: Illustration/icon and '0 data' message displayed. Table headers remain visible.

frictions.description: agent-browser keyboard type appends text instead of replacing existing content in search fields
frictions.resolution: Used Reset Filter button to clear state between searches

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 2 passed, 1 failed (VAL-DASH-003: PA2 items missing from All status view), 1 pass with minor note
